title: Masha and the Bear: Twice the Fun
original_title: Masha and the Bear: Twice the Fun
overview: Masha leaves the forest in pursuit of an adventure in the city, where she encounters many unexpected situations and surprises while attending a wedding, and later seeks to do everything in her power to save Christmas.
